title: calamintha glandulosa var. canescens
intro: Calamintha glandulosa var. canescens, also known as Mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mountain mint include relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve mental clarity. Herbal preparations of Mountain mint can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, allowing for a range of applications in aromatherapy and natural medicine.
